title: Jhordvar
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Update|[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Jhordvar |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]'' |species=[[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Jabba's criminal empire/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's criminal empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I did as you commanded, Lord Jabba. I gave the assassin Jhordvar the choice of returning with me, or accepting his own death. He chose the latter. Unfortunately for him. But not, o Mighty Jabba, for you.|Boba Fett claims the bounty placed on Jhordvar|}} '''Jhordvar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] who worked briefly for the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. When Jhordvar tried to betray Jabba, the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the assassin, who was [[Bounty hunter/Legends|tracked]] to his hideout in [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine's]] [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] by the young bounty hunter [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. Fett [[Death/Legends|killed]] the Noghri after a fierce fight and then took Jhordvar's [[Limb/Legends|hands]] and his [[Ring/Legends|ring]] back to Jabba to justify his claim on the bounty. ==Biography== {{Quote|Jabba sends a lackey to do an assassin's job!''"
"''Wrong. He sent the best bounty hunter of his house.|Jhordvar and Boba Fett, upon meeting each other|}} Jhordvar, a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]], was an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] who lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. During the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-wide [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Jhordvar briefly worked for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]], a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] who operated on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. However, in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the Noghri tried to betray Jabba, and the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] hired the young [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to capture or [[Death/Legends|kill]] Jhordvar, who had gone into hiding in Tatooine's vast [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]]. Fett soon found Jhordvar in his hideout and offered him the chance to accompany him back to [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] peacefully. However, the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] refused to surrender to a "lackey" and was killed after a short but fierce battle. A [[Sandstorm/Legends|sandstorm]] left Fett stranded at the hideout for a few [[Standard day/Legends|days]], and Jhordvar's body was exposed to sand and heat, which [[Mummy/Legends|mummified]] the remains of the assassin and snapped off his [[Limb/Legends|hands]]. Fett took only the hands as identification back to Jabba and left the rest of the body in the desert. Upon Fett's return, Jabba's [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]], [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]], identified Jhordvar by a [[Ring/Legends|ring]] the assassin had left on one of his hands, and Fett received his [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|You know, Jhordvar, you should've surrendered when you had the chance. But you fought bravely, I'll give you that.|Boba Fett, after Jhordvar's death|}} Jhordvar was a formidable assassin,{{SW|url=news/so-uncivilized-great-gunslingers-in-star-wars-part-1|series=So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} but he was nevertheless overpowered and killed by the young Boba Fett after a fierce fight. Although Jhordvar did not believe that Fett would be able to defeat him, the young Mandalorian proved otherwise and respected the fallen enemy for his brave fight. Jhordvar owned an expensive [[Color/Legends|gold-green]] [[amaralite]] ring, which later served to identify Jhordvar's mummified hands and which Jabba later gave to Fett as a bonus. ==Behind the scenes== Jhordvar first appeared in ''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]'', a young readers novel written by [[Elizabeth Hand]] and published in [[2004]]. In [[2008]], he received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. [[2013|Five years later]], Jhordvar was mentioned in "[[So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars]], Part 1," a [[Star Wars Blog|''Star Wars'' Blog]] entry. The article was written by [[Edward M. Erdelac]] and mentioned Jhordvar in the passage about his killer, Boba Fett. ==Appearances== *''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]'' {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{SW|url=news/so-uncivilized-great-gunslingers-in-star-wars-part-1|series=So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Assassins]] [[Category:Desilijic servants]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Noghri]]
